detaileddescription.para: This header file contains internal data types and functions declarations for the Xilinx HDCP 2.2 Receiver. MODIFICATION HISTORY:

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 MH 10/30/15 First Release 1.01 MH 03/02/16 Moved prototype of XHdcp22Rx_CalcMontNPrime to to internal functions. 1.02 MH 04/14/16 Updated for repeater upstream support.
